sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، وَتَتَجَلَّى غَالِبًا فِي تَقْدِيمِ الْقَهْوَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoljubivost se smatra kamenom temeljcem arapske kulture, a često se očituje u posluživanju autentične arapske kafe.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered a cornerstone of Arab culture, and it is often manifested in the serving of authentic Arabic coffee.

sentences.arabic: تُسْكَبُ الْقَهْوَةُ الْمَنْكَهَةُ بِالْهَيْلِ فِي فَنَاجِينَ صَغِيرَةٍ لِلتَّرْحِيبِ بِالضُّيُوفِ عِنْدَ دُخُولِهِمُ الْمَنْزِلَ.
sentences.translation: Kafa aromatizirana kardamomom sipa se u male fildžane kako bi se poželjela dobrodošlica gostima pri ulasku u dom.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee flavored with cardamom is poured into small cups to welcome guests as they enter the home.

sentences.arabic: يُرَافِقُهَا تَقْلِيدِيًّا أَجْوَدُ أَنْوَاعِ التُّمُورِ، الَّتِي تُوَازِنُ مَذَاقَ الْقَهْوَةِ الْمُرِّ بِحَلَاوَتِهَا الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalno je prate najfinije vrste hurmi, koje svojom prirodnom slatkoćom uravnotežuju gorak okus kafe.
sentences.translationEn: It is traditionally accompanied by the finest types of dates, which balance the bitter taste of the coffee with their natural sweetness.

sentences.arabic: يَعْكِسُ هَذَا الطَّقْسُ قِيَمًا رَاسِخَةً مِنَ الْكَرَمِ وَالِاحْتِرَامِ تَنَاقَلَتْهَا الْأَجْيَالُ عَبْرَ الْعُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj ritual odražava duboko ukorijenjene vrijednosti velikodušnosti i poštovanja koje su se generacijama prenosile kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: This ritual reflects deep-rooted values of generosity and respect that have been passed down through generations over the centuries.

sentences.arabic: حَتَّى فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ، تَبْقَى هَذِهِ الْعَادَاتُ جُزْءًا حَيَوِيًّا مِنَ التَّجَمُّعَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ وَالْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الرَّسْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Čak i u modernom dobu, ovi običaji ostaju vitalni dio društvenih okupljanja i službenih prilika.
sentences.translationEn: Even in the modern era, these customs remain a vital part of social gatherings and official occasions.
